zh.lifeSummary: 當Olivia Mare於大約1193年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，她的父親William de la Mare45歲，母親Mabel Malherbe35歲。她於1227年與John de Thornhill在英國英格蘭越可爾恩爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1254年在英國越可爾恩爾享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Olivia Mare于大约1193年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，她的父亲William de la Mare45岁，母亲Mabel Malherbe35岁。她于1227年与John de Thornhill在英国英格兰越可爾恩爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1254年在英国越可爾恩爾享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Americo, Cesareo, Fernando, Ines, Javier, Jose, Marcos.  Portuguese Henrique.  Italian Antonio, Gino, Olindo, Silvio, Vito.  Dutch Andries.
Italian: topographic name for someone living by the sea, from mare ‘sea’.

variants.name: Marucci
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Antonio, Silvio, Angelo, Carmela, Domenic, Donato, Egidio, Guido, Licinio, Lorenzo, Luciano.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Maruccio, a pet form of Mare or Mari .

variants.name: Marelli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Giuseppe, Angelo, Dante.
patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Mare  .

variants.name: Mear
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Franz, Helmut, Wilhelm, Erwin, Gerhard, Heinz, Ilse, Lorenz, Wolfgang.

English (Staffordshire): post-medieval form of Mear, which is either a topographic name, from Middle English mere ‘pond, pool’ (Old English mere) or Middle English mere ‘boundary’ (Old English (ge)mǣre), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places with names derived from these terms, such as Mere (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Wiltshire), Meir in Caverswall (Staffordshire), and Meare (Somerset).
English: occupational name for a physician, from Old French mire, Middle English mire, meir, meyre, originally synonymous with Myer .

nameMeanings.name: Olivia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, first used by Shakespeare for the rich heiress wooed by the duke in Twelfth Night ( 1599 ). Shakespeare may have taken it as a feminine form of Oliver or he may have derived it from Latin oliva ‘olive’. In the 1970s it was particularly associated with the Australian pop singer and actress Olivia Newton-John ( b. 1948 ). Since the 1990s it has been very popular throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Olivia Mare was born about 1193, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de la Mare, was 45 and her mother, Mabel Malherbe, was 35. She married John de Thornhill in 1227, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1254, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Olivia Mare est née environ 1193, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de la Mare, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Mabel Malherbe, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé John de Thornhill en 1227, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1254, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Olivia Mare um 1193 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de la Mare 45 und ihre Mutter Mabel Malherbe 35. Sie hat 1227 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom John de Thornhill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1254 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Olivia Mare è nata il circa 1193 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de la Mare, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Mabel Malherbe, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato John de Thornhill nel 1227, nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1254, nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Olivia Mareが約1193年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de la Mareは45歳，母Mabel Malherbeは35歳であった。1227年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルでJohn de Thornhillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1254年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Olivia Mare(이)가 대략 1193년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de la Mare(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel Malherbe(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1227년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 토른힐에서 John de Thornhill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1254년 영국 요르크실르 토른힐에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Olivia Mare nasceu aproximadamente 1193, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de la Mare, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Mabel Malherbe, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Thornhill em 1227, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1254, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Olivia Mare родилась около 1193 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de la Mare было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel Malherbe, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Thornhill в 1227 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1254 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Olivia Mare nació aproximadamente 1193, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de la Mare, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Mabel Malherbe, tenía 35 años. Se casó con John de Thornhill en 1227, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1254, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
